headline: Camden Property Trust Announces Second Quarter 2026 Dividend
summary: HOUSTON, June 15, 2026--The Board of Trust Managers of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the "Company") declared a second quarter cash dividend of $1.06 per share to holders of record as of June 30, 2026 of its Common Shares of Beneficial Interest. The dividend is to be paid on July 17, 2026.

headline: Camden Property Trust vs. Invitation Homes: Which Real Estate Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: One company leads in multifamily apartments, the other dominates single-family rentals. Each has distinct growth, risk, and valuation profiles for 2026.
